column3: Description
Allow users to create accounts with email and password
Authenticate users with credentials
Users can register their vehicles with license plate and details
Display real-time availability of parking spots
Monitor and track parking space occupancy in real-time
Allow users to reserve parking spots in advance
Process parking payments via multiple payment methods
Dashboard for administrators to manage parking operations
Generate reports on occupancy
Send notifications to users about reservations and payments
Send SMS alerts for parking reminders and alerts
Configure and manage parking rates and tariffs
Automatically calculate parking duration and charges
Handle reservation cancellations with appropriate refunds
Support management of multiple parking facilities
Allow users to update personal information and preferences
Display transaction and payment history for users
Search and filter parking locations by availability and price
Integrate maps to show parking location and directions
Allow users to rate and review parking facilities
Offer monthly parking passes and subscriptions
Implement loyalty rewards for frequent users
Send push notifications to mobile app users
Implement SSL/TLS and data encryption for security
Log all system activities for audit and compliance
Implement role-based permissions for users and admins
Provide REST APIs for third-party integrations
Automated regular backups of system data
Ensure system can handle growing number of users and transactions
